profile.name: Joao Santos
profile.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
profile.bio: A meticulous developer gathering knowledge by building things for fun :)

about: I'm a full-stack developer with 6 years of experience building applications and understanding how the full development process comes together. I specialize in ReactJS, Laravel, and Node.js, with a focus on applying SOLID principles and Clean Architecture. I'm passionate about automating complex workflows, reducing technical debt, and collaborating in agile environments to deliver scalable, high-impact solutions.

experience.description: Collaborated to engineer a plug-and-play integration tool using Go, transforming a 30-day manual process into an automated workflow. Refactored legacy PHP portals into scalable Laravel REST APIs and developed administrative dashboards using Bootstrap.

Identified and resolved root causes of recurring support tickets by deploying permanent fixes using React and PHP. Managed the end-to-end ticket lifecycle using Jira and daily Scrum syncs to accelerate hotfix deployment.

Spearheaded full-stack modernization using Laravel and ReactJS. Modeled scalable MySQL databases and established CI/CD workflows using GitLab. Directed the team using Agile Scrum methodologies to streamline sprint planning.
